channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Las 10 habilidades de TI empresariales más demandadas
item.description: El software y los servicios que una organización elija para impulsar su negocio pueden determinar el éxito general o el fracaso de éste.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Microsoft Office Updates: Latest Features and Security Fixes
item.description: Stay up-to-date with the latest Microsoft Office version updates, featuring new features, bug fixes, and security patches.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Meta contractor dismissed threats to moderators from Ethiopia rebels
item.description: A contractor hired by Facebook’s parent company Meta dismissed threats to content moderators by Ethiopian rebels angered by their work, according to new evidence filed in a case challenging the dismissal of dozens of moderators in Kenya.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Why Meta shareholders are seeking sanctions for former COO Sheryl Sandberg
item.description: Attorneys for Meta shareholders asked a Delaware judge Monday to sanction the company’s former Chief Operating Officer Sheryl Sandberg and fellow Facebook board member and current White House chief of staff Jeff Zients for deleting emails related to the Cambridge Analytica privacy scandal, despite b
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Fortnite players 'tricked' into unwanted purchases are starting to get refunds. Here's how to apply
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — U.S. consumers who were “tricked” into purchases they didn't want from Fortnite maker Epic Games are now starting to receive refund checks, the Federal Trade Commission said this week.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Atmospheric river and potential bomb cyclone will bring messy, dangerous weather to East Coast
item.description: The East Coast is due for a whiplash-inducing rainy, windy and potentially dangerous stretch of weather.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Whittle, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: 2024 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Boosting Cyprus' defense is key so close to the war-wracked Mideast, defense minister says
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — Bolstering Cyprus ' defense capacity is critical for the east Mediterranean island nation so close to the war-wrecked Middle East, the country's defense minister said Tuesday. The priority for Cyprus is to procure better defense systems, said Defense Minister Vasilis Palmas.
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: OpenAI releases video creation tool
item.description: ChatGPT producer OpenAI rolled out a video creation tool this week that lets paying customers create short-length video clips through text prompts. OpenAI introduced Sora, a video generation model, on Monday. It can generate realistic videos in a resolution up to 1080p and up to 20 seconds long.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Network World’s Best of Enterprise Network 2024 award winners
item.description: In many ways, networking is a mature, stable industry, based on established technologies like Wi-Fi and Ethernet, which just celebrated its 50th anniversary.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: San Jose green homes and tech hubs project due to launch in 2025
item.description: An effort to produce thousands of green homes alongside data centers in downtown San Jose is slated to launch in 2025.
item.dc:creator: George Avalos, The Mercury News

item.title: Cato Networks brings IoT, OT support to SASE platform
item.description: Cato Networks today announced new capabilities for its cloud-based service access service edge (SASE) platform that will enable enterprise organizations to more easily manage and secure Internet of Things (IoT) and operational technology (OT) devices.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 4 browser-boosting ChatGPT Chrome extensions
item.description: Plenty of people who use ChatGPT get stuff done by hopping between OpenAI’s chatbot and broader web-browsing sessions. But extensions that fuse ChatGPT right into Chrome have resulted in a peanut-butter-and-chocolate moment for AI and web browsing.
item.dc:creator: Doug Aamoth, Fast Company

item.title: OpenAI expands multimodal capabilities with updated text-to-video model
item.description: OpenAI has released a new version of its text-to-video AI model, Sora, for ChatGPT Plus and Pro users, marking another step in expansion into multimodal AI technologies.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: China launches anti-monopoly probe into Nvidia amid rising US-China chip tensions
item.description: China has initiated an investigation into Nvidia over alleged violations of the country’s anti-monopoly laws, signaling a potential escalation in the ongoing tech and trade tensions between Beijing and Washington.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Nvidia's stock dips after China opens probe of the AI chip company for violating anti-monopoly laws
item.description: Shares of Nvidia fell Monday after China said it is investigating the high-flying U.S. microchip company over suspected violations of Chinese anti-monopoly laws.
item.dc:creator: MATT OTT, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Mass evacuation of Philippine villages underway after a brief but major volcanic eruption
item.description: About 87,000 people are being evacuated in a central Philippine region after a volcano erupted with a huge plume of ash and superhot streams of gas and debris hurtling down its slopes.
item.dc:creator: Jim Gomez, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: California to consider requiring mental health warnings on social media sites
item.description: SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — California, home to some of the largest technology companies in the world, would be the first U.S. state to require mental health warning labels on social media sites if lawmakers pass a bill introduced Monday.
item.dc:creator: TRÂN NGUYỄN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Microsoft’s Copilot Vision assistant can now browse the web with you
item.description: Microsoft’s Copilot Vision feature is now available for users to test in a limited preview. Built natively into Microsoft’s Edge browser, Copilot Vision analyzes and understands the contents of web pages you visit.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Defense Commissary Agency Balances Cybersecurity and Customer Experience
item.description: Defense Commissary Agency (DeCA) strives to achieve a balance between cybersecurity and customer experience by leveraging native cloud security tools, enhancing interoperability with private sector services, viewing OT and IT through the same lens, and implementing automated technology.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Supply chain compromise of Ultralytics AI library results in trojanized versions
item.description: Attackers have compromised Ultralytics YOLO packages published on PyPI, the official Python package index, by compromising the build environment of the popular library for creating custom machine learning models.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: UnitedHealthcare CEO murder: How Silicon Valley protects its CEOs
item.description: Trying to keep tech leaders safe in a country awash with guns, and in an industry that can generate volatile emotions, does not come cheaply.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Baron, The Mercury News

item.title: IAEA chief: Iran is poised to 'quite dramatically' increase stockpile of near weapons-grade uranium
item.description: MANAMA, Bahrain (AP) — Iran is poised to “quite dramatically” increase its stockpile of near weapons-grade uranium as it has started cascades of advanced centrifuges, the head of the International Atomic Energy Agency warned Friday.
item.dc:creator: JON GAMBRELL, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Federal appeals court upholds law requiring sale or ban of TikTok in the US
item.description: A federal appeals court panel on Friday unanimously upheld a law that could lead to a ban on TikTok as soon as next month, handing a resounding defeat to the popular social media platform as it fights for its survival in the U.S. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: China's ban on key high-tech materials could have broad impact on industries, economy
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — China has banned exports of key materials used to make a wide range of products, including smartphones, electric vehicles, radar systems and CT scanners, swiping back at Washington after it expanded export controls to include dozens of Chinese companies that make equipment used to pro
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: From outsider to the Oval Office, bitcoin surges as a new administration embraces crypto
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Born from the ashes of the 2008 global financial crisis, bitcoin arrived after trust had withered in the financial system and in Washington's ability to protect those who must participate in it.
item.dc:creator: STAN CHOE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Chinese online retailer Temu suspended in Vietnam
item.description: HANOI, Vietnam (AP) — Vietnam has suspended the operations of Chinese online retailer Temu after it failed to meet a government deadline to register the company by the end of November.
item.dc:creator: ANIRUDDHA GHOSAL, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Alleged Chinese cyberattack: FBI urges encrypted apps
item.description: Salt Typhoon, a Chinese government-linked hacking group, is one of the largest intelligence breaches in U.S. history.
item.dc:creator: NewsNation Staff, NewsNation
